seo.title: Mid-Autumn Festival 中秋节 — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
seo.description: Celebrate Mid-Autumn Festival with our special seasonal menu and mooncake gift boxes. Reserve your table at Grand Pavilion, Flushing NY.

festival.name: Mid-Autumn Festival
festival.tagline: A Season of Reunion, Moonlight, and Cantonese Tradition
festival.description: Mid-Autumn Festival is a celebration of family reunion, harvest, and the full moon. At Grand Pavilion, we mark this beloved holiday with a special seasonal menu featuring dishes of gathering and abundance, alongside our artisan mooncake gift boxes.
festival.descriptionZh: 中秋节是庆祝家人团聚、丰收与圆月的节日。在大观楼，我们以精心策划的节庆菜单迎接这个传统节日，并提供手工月饼礼盒。
festival.urgencyMessage: Mooncake gift boxes available while supplies last

courses.description: Traditional sweet soup for the festival
